title: PMO / Product Portfolio Management Lead
required_skills: PMO / Project Management / Product Governance experience
Strong analytical skills with ability to translate data into actionable insights
Experience working with Agile teams and product-based organizations
Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail
matched_skills: PMO / Project Management / Product Governance experience
Strong analytical skills with ability to translate data into actionable insights
Experience working with Agile teams and product-based organizations
Reporting tools proficiency (Power BI, Looker Studio)
Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail
core_responsibilities: Provide governance and operational support to product teams ensuring structured delivery and alignment
Collect, analyze, and consolidate product and delivery data into meaningful insights and reporting
Prepare and manage status reporting, dashboards, and stakeholder updates
Track resource allocation, budgets, and financial performance across product teams
Support risk, issue, and dependency management to ensure smooth delivery
culture_keywords: connective layer between Agile and governance
intersection of Agile delivery and structured governance
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC PMO title and USD 8M budget governance — directly mirrors the financial tracking and programme governance requirements
Highlight Jira and Confluence explicitly as primary tools in the CV header or skills section
Emphasize the multi-stakeholder and C-suite reporting experience at HSBC to demonstrate executive-level communication
Quantify the risk escalation and dependency management work across 6 workstreams at HSBC
Call out Agile sprint ceremonies participation at Hapag-Lloyd (planning, stand-ups, retrospectives) to satisfy the Agile teams experience requirement
Mention Power BI and Excel dashboards together to address the reporting tools and Excel requirements
Note German B1 proficiency since it is listed as a plus — worth surfacing despite not being fluent
